name: Patti LaBelle
abstract: Patricia Louise Holte (born May 24, 1944), known professionally as Patti LaBelle, is an American R&B singer and actress. She has been referred to as the "Godmother of Soul".

about_quotes.speaker: Clyde Kerr Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: we did a lot of sessions with people like Patti LaBelle ... we did one ... with Paul McCartney when he was in New Orleans, that album “Venus and Mars”
